AddressInfo.Title: Wembley Stadium Red Car Park
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Enter from the South Way or Royal Route entrance and the charge points are in most bays on levels 1 and 2. Unfortunately anyone can park in the bays and they are often occupied by ICE vehicles. Not all of the points work, so look for the flashing green light to show it is ready. At present, you don't need to be a member of a charging provider.

GeneralComments: The instruction sign says to use the main panel on each floor to start the charge. This system isn't fully working yet, as long as the green light on the the chargepoint is flashing you can plug in and start charging.
